rows.label: xs33520100_MSG0010
rows.name:
Haaaah... Thank goodness.
I finally met up with my team[ST:wide ]—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33520100_MSG0020
rows.name:
When I came to, I was the only one in the enemy stronghold.
I really panicked, you know[ST:wide ]—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33520100_MSG0030
rows.name:
Well, anyway, I'm glad you're safe too.
We've still got a long way to go from here, right![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33520100_MSG0040
rows.name:
Let's hurry back to where Void is
and save Al-san![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33520100_MSG0050
rows.name:
Then we defeat Void[ST:wide ]—
and we all return home safely together.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33520100_MSG0060
rows.name:
We can definitely do it.
Let's push hard and give it our best![ST:wait ]
